mapper.insert: INSERT INTO trainer_pricing (trainer_id, label, session_count, price, is_popular, is_active) VALUES (#{trainerId}, #{label}, #{sessionCount}, #{price}, #{popular}, #{active})
mapper.select: SELECT id, trainer_id, label, session_count, price, is_popular, is_active, created_at FROM trainer_pricing WHERE trainer_id = #{trainerId} AND is_active = 1 ORDER BY session_count ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE trainer_pricing SET is_active = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
